notes: "Exempt" is cumulative count of employers who certified exemption (have a qualifying retirement plan or are otherwise excluded). Funded Accounts = 599,352; Payroll Contributing Accounts = 711,760. Mandate state since 2019; effective opt-out rate 35.4%.

source_type: August 2025 Oregon Retirement Savings Board materials (Quarterly Dashboard p.94)
notes: "Total Exempted Employers" (Vestwell/Sellwood). Total Funded Accounts = 137,765; Total Payroll Contributing = 174,974. Mandate effective 2017. Nov 2025 board meeting indicates AUM exceeded $420M but no exemption update.
"Total Exempted" cumulative. Funded Accounts = 169,745; Payroll Contributing = 197,607. Effective opt-out rate 37.17%. Mandate effective 2018.

source_type: Connecticut State Comptroller program landing page
notes: Current snapshot lacks cumulative exemption count. Older Oct-2023 press release reported 10,900+ exempt employers (Comptroller Scanlon press release). 2023 Annual Report (FY2023): 4,414 registered employers, 15,981 savers, $6.5M assets. Program launched April 2022.

source_type: DLS Office of Policy Analysis 2024 Evaluation
notes: MD reports SDAT fee waiver counts not pure exemptions. Tax-year 2023 fee waiver list = 22,048 businesses (DLS via MarylandSaves) of which ~14,100 already had a retirement plan, ~5,000 had certified exemption from program requirements, ~3,800 enrolled in MarylandSaves. "Exemption_filings_cumulative" reports the ~4,900-5,000 certified-exemption figure (program requirement exemptions; not the broader fee waiver category). Mandate launched September 2022. No noncompliance penalties.
"Verified offer retirement plan" count = 26,000 = treated as cumulative-exemption-equivalent. Newer Aug-2025 press release: 17,025 registered, 85,000 savers, $140M+. Mandate launched Jan 2023.

source_type: Commonwealth Savers JLARC 2025 Annual Status presentation slide 13
notes: VA does NOT publish exemption or registration counts. Funded accounts 16,400 as of May 2025. Mandate covers 25+ employee employers since 2023; deadline Feb 15 2024. Renamed from Virginia529 to Commonwealth Savers in 2024-2025.

3,000 "participating employers" reported in press release. Combined "registered or exempted" = 8,000+ (MERIT media page) implying ~5,000 exempted. Mandate phased in 2024; full deadline June 30 2025. 5+ employee threshold.
Exemption count not published in press releases. Program launched July 2024. Registered employers = 1,944. Average funded account balance $1,139.64. Mandate is 5+ employees in business 6+ months.

NJ does NOT publish exemption count or registered-employer count in this update. July 2025 Treasury press release reported 1,200+ employers / 18,000 savers / $8.1M after first year. Mandate launched June 2024 for 25+ employee firms; expanded to 10+ employees by A5358 signed Jan 2025. Program fee 0.75%.
